hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"; echo "║   BLIND ASSISTANT — AUTONOMOUS LOOP  ║"; echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝"; echo ""; echo "── Current State ──"; grep -E "\*\*Phase\*\*|\*\*Status\*\*|\*\*Cycles" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/CYCLE_STATE.md" 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo ""; echo "── Top Priority ──"; grep -A 1 "## Current Stack" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/PRIORITY_STACK.md" 2>/dev/null | tail -3; echo ""; echo "── Last Lesson ──"; tail -8 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/LESSONS.md" 2>/dev/null; echo ""; echo "Run /run-cycle to continue. Run /retrospective for health check."'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"); b=os.path.basename(p); t=\"test\" if (\"/tests/\" in p or b.startswith(\"test_\")) else \"src\" if \"/src/\" in p else \"docs\" if \"/docs/\" in p else \"ci\" if \"/.github/\" in p else \"agent\" if \"/.claude/\" in p else \"cfg\"; print(t+\": \"+b if b else \"files\")" 2>/dev/null || echo "files"); cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add -A && if git status --short | grep -q .; then git commit -m "wip($FILE) $(date +%H:%M)" 2>/dev/null && git push 2>/dev/null || git pull --rebase && git push 2>/dev/null; fi; true'

bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm -rf \.|git push --force|DROP TABLE|DELETE FROM"; then echo "Blocked: potentially destructive — needs explicit confirmation" >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "(rm|unlink|rmdir|git rm).*(test_|_test|/tests/)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot delete test files. Fix failing tests by fixing the implementation." >&2; exit 2; fi; true'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); CONTENT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d.get(\"content\",\"\")))" 2>/dev/null || echo "999"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "test_.*\.py$|_test\.py$"; then if [ "$CONTENT" -lt 50 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: Writing a very short test file ($CONTENT chars). Test files should have real assertions, not be empty or trivial." >&2; fi; fi; true'

bash -c 'cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add -A && if git status --short | grep -q .; then CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -5 | tr "\n" ", " | sed "s/, $//"); git commit -m "chore: session end — unsaved changes pushed$([ -n "$CHANGED" ] && echo " ($CHANGED)" || echo "")" 2>/dev/null; fi && git push 2>/dev/null || git pull --rebase && git push 2>/dev/null; echo "✓ All changes pushed to GitHub."; true'
